scripts.dev:db:master-d1:migrations:list: bunx wrangler d1 migrations list MASTER_D1 --env dev --local
scripts.dev:db:master-d1:migrations:apply: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply MASTER_D1 --env dev --local
scripts.prd:db:master-d1:migrations:list: doppler run -c prd -- bunx wrangler d1 migrations list MASTER_D1 --env prd --remote
scripts.prd:db:master-d1:migrations:apply: doppler run -c prd -- bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply MASTER_D1 --env prd --remote
scripts.prd:pulumi:stack-init: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi stack init prd --cwd src/infra
scripts.prd:pulumi:stack-ls: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi stack ls --cwd src/infra
scripts.prd:pulumi:preview: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi preview --cwd src/infra --stack prd
scripts.prd:pulumi:refresh: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi refresh --cwd src/infra --stack prd
scripts.prd:pulumi:up: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi up --cwd src/infra --stack prd
scripts.prd:pulumi:stack-output: doppler run -c prd -- pulumi stack output --json --cwd src/infra --stack prd
scripts.prd:once:set-d1-database-ids: doppler run -c prd -- bun run src/infra/tasks/set-d1-database-ids.ts
scripts.prd:build: doppler run -c prd -- bun vite build
scripts.prd:wrangler-deploy: doppler run -c prd --mount secrets.json -- bun wrangler deploy --secrets-file secrets.json
scripts.__comment:prd:deploy: The top level `doppler run -c prd` is needed to access CF tokens, so CLI can push to CF workers.
scripts.prd:deploy: doppler run -c prd -- run-s prd:build prd:wrangler-deploy
